title: Middle Eastern Beef Ouzi
description: A flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring slow-cooked beef in a rich and aromatic sauce, served over basmati rice.

ingredients.name: Ouzi Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the ouzi spice mix, allspice, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Stir in 2 tablespoons of chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve the beef and sauce over basmati rice and garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
